phoneticUs: 藢忙nt瑟藞sm蓱藧伞; 藢忙nta瑟藞sm蓱藧伞; 藢忙nt瑟藞sm蓴藧伞
examples: The banning of antismog additive MTBE (methyl tertiary-butyl ether) presented a new challenge.
Also helping the business are environmental mandates (depending on where it is sold, some gasoline must contain up to 10% ethanol as an antismog measure) and energy independence mandates.
